svg.text: Entry Rules — Where to Press the Trigger
Wave count alone is academic. These 4 entry zones turn it into actionable, defined-risk trades.

g.text: Entry A · Long at end of W2 (preparation for W3)
Wait for W2 to retrace 50-61.8% of W1 · enter on bullish reversal candle
Stop: below start of W1 (max loss = ~30% of W1 length)
Win rate ~64% · target 1.618× W1 from W2 low · 3-5R
Entry B · Long at end of W4 (preparation for W5)
Wait for W4 to retrace 23.6-38.2% of W3 · alternation considered (if W2 sharp, W4 sideways)
Win rate ~58% · smaller target than W3 but cleaner structure · 2-3R
Entry C · Short at end of W5 (preparation for ABC)
Wait for W5 to print divergence on RSI or fail to make new high (truncation)
Win rate ~55% · counter-trend · target end of W4 (38-50% retrace)
Entry D · Long at end of C (after correction completes)
Wait for C to equal or exceed A in length · bullish reversal candle on 1H
Win rate ~62% · start of new impulse · 4-6R target
Trade ONLY Entry A and Entry D · these are the highest-confidence Elliott setups
Skip B and C until you have 50+ documented A/D trades behind you
